title: Fix Admin Panel Access and Functionality - Frontend

requirements.summary: Verify admin route protection correctly processes isCallerAdmin response and displays AdminPanel when authenticated
acceptanceCriteria: Admin route displays AdminPanel when isOwner is true
No infinite loading states occur during permission check
Access denied message only shows when backend explicitly returns false

file_operations.description: Review and verify the admin route protection logic that checks isOwner state from useIsOwner hook. Ensure the conditional rendering correctly displays AdminPanel when isOwner is true, shows loading state appropriately without infinite loops, and displays access denied only when isOwner is explicitly false. Verify the debug logging captures the complete authentication flow including timing and state transitions.

requirements.summary: Verify useIsOwner hook correctly calls isCallerAdmin and processes boolean response without type coercion errors
acceptanceCriteria: Boolean response is not converted or misinterpreted
Console logs show exact boolean value and type from backend

file_operations.description: Review and verify the useIsOwner hook implementation that calls actor.isCallerAdmin(). Ensure the response handling preserves the boolean type without any coercion or conversion that could change true to false. Add or verify console logging that outputs the exact boolean value and its JavaScript type using typeof. Check the query configuration including enabled conditions, retry logic, and staleTime settings to ensure proper behavior. Verify the timeout fallback logic doesn't interfere with legitimate true responses.
